task_completion.description: Add a 'VIP' taxonomy term to the 'Product categories' vocabulary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The taxonomy term list for 'Product categories' shows 'VIP', or a success message indicates the 'VIP' term was created.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'VIP' category to the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The product edit page for the Sony headphones shows 'VIP' selected in the Product categories field, or a success message is visible after saving the updated product.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'VIP' category to the 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The product edit page for the Logitech mouse shows 'VIP' selected in the Product categories field, or a success message is visible after saving the updated product.

task_completion.description: Configure a new Page View titled 'VIP Exclusives' at the path /vip-products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Views configuration page shows a view named 'VIP Exclusives' with a Page display set to the path '/vip-products'.

task_completion.description: Set the View to use a grid display and filter for products in the 'VIP' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the View configuration UI, the Format is set to 'Grid' and the Filter criteria includes the 'VIP' taxonomy term.

task_completion.description: Restrict the View access to Authenticated users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the View configuration UI, the Access setting is restricted by Role to 'Authenticated user', or a screenshot shows a 403 Access Denied page when visiting /vip-products as an anonymous user.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal web interface to create the taxonomy term, update products, and create the view.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Drupal admin UI being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than terminal commands (like drush) or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Drupal application in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the appropriate local development URL (e.g., localhost), and the Drupal interface is fully rendered.

integrity.description: The agent built the view using Drupal's standard site-building tools rather than creating a static HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Views UI configuration screens are visible in the screenshots, demonstrating genuine configuration of the CMS.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required taxonomy term is 'VIP' in the 'Product categories' vocabulary. The two products that must be assigned this term are 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5) and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S). The View must be titled 'VIP Exclusives', located at the path '/vip-products', use a Grid display format, filter by the 'VIP' category, and have its access restricted to the 'authenticated' role.
